jsonLd.title: Principal Investment Banker at FreeCharge
jsonLd.description:
We at FreeCharge are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About FreeCharge:
FreeCharge is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreeCharge!
